questionHtml: Use the equation of your regression line to predict the Science test score for a student who has a score of 78 on the Mathematics test. Express your answer to the nearest integer.
markschemeHtml:
correct substitution of 78 into their regression equation                 (M1)

81.3930… 81.23 from 3 sf answer

81                 A1

 

[2 marks]
